main.name: Augusto Zangrandi
main.description: I build tools that help great companies take their products to the next level
main.bio: Hi. I'm a full-stack software developer with 7+ years experience working with Ruby on Rails, and 3 years with ReactJS. In this time I have helped several companies to considerably improve their products and MVPs to come to market.

testimonials.text:
Augusto is a top notch Ruby developer. He helped build a variety of features on our platform. He is a self-starter and doesn't need much direction to be creative and come up with a solution to a problem. He also comes up with his own ideas on how to improve product or technology, which is a huge plus. 

 Overall, he is highly recommended.
Would definitely work with Augusto again.
